description_long: This is a standard claw hammer featuring a metallic head and a blue, ergonomically designed handle. The head consists of a flat striking face on one side and a curved claw on the other, used for pulling nails. The handle is straight with a slight ergonomic contour and appears to be coated in a textured, rubberized material for enhanced grip and comfort. The metallic shaft connects the head to the handle, providing strength and durability. The hammer's overall design is practical and robust, suitable for a variety of construction or repair tasks in urban environments. No visible branding, wear, or accessories are present on the object.
description: A blue-handled claw hammer with a metallic head and ergonomic, textured grip. Features a flat striking face and a curved claw for nail removal.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the blue handle and the profile of the claw and striking face.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the width of the hammer head and the centered blue handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the handle and the curvature of the claw, with the striking face visible.
description_view_3: Top-down view emphasizing the head's width, the claw's curve, and the handle's ergonomic shape.
attribute_handle_type: Rubberized ergonomic grip handle, straight with slight contour, blue in color, textured for enhanced grip.
attribute_head_type: Claw hammer head with a flat striking face and a curved claw for nail removal, made of steel.
